column1: # Generated from TA_TALE_TAx4 GPS & NED.xlsx (Kido/Okuda analysis)
# Height correction: h_itrf = H_NED + N_geoid + h_antenna - 0.73
#   N_geoid:    GEOID12B undulation (NAD83 ellipsoid to NAVD88 geoid)
#   h_antenna:  SD GPS antenna height above ground (0.89 m)
# Horizontal coordinates: from Motorola Oncore GPS (WGS84
# Vertical coordinate:    from NED + geoid (avoids ~5.3 m L1 ionospheric bias)

column2: likely DEM interpolation error on slopes

column1: # iono_residual: h_gps - h_itrf (measures ionospheric height bias per station)
